content.problemStatement:
The weather report of Chefland is Good if the number of sunny days in a week is strictly greater than the number of rainy days.

Given 777 integers A1,A2,A3,A4,A5,A6,A7A_1, A_2, A_3, A_4, A_5, A_6, A_7A1​,A2​,A3​,A4​,A5​,A6​,A7​ where Ai=1A_i = 1Ai​=1 denotes that the ithi^{th}ith day of week in Chefland is a sunny day, Ai=0A_i = 0Ai​=0 denotes that the ithi^{th}ith day in Chefland is a rainy day. Determine if the weather report of Chefland is Good or not.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains of a single line of input, 777 space separated integers A1,A2,A3,A4,A5,A6,A7A_1, A_2, A_3, A_4, A_5, A_6, A_7A1​,A2​,A3​,A4​,A5​,A6​,A7​.


Output Format
For each testcase, print "YES" if the weather report of Chefland is Good, otherwise print "NO". Print the output without quotes.


You may print each character of the string in uppercase or lowercase (for example, the strings "yEs", "yes", "Yes" and "YES" will all be treated as identical).
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains seven space‑separated integers A1 … A7 where Ai is 1 if the i‑th day is sunny and 0 if it is rainy.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output "YES" if the number of sunny days is strictly greater than the number of rainy days, otherwise output "NO". Each answer is printed on its own line.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Test case 1: sunny days = 5, rainy = 2 → YES.
Test case 2: sunny = 1, rainy = 6 → NO.
Test case 3: sunny = 7, rainy = 0 → YES.
Test case 4: sunny = 1, rainy = 6 → NO.

solution.approach: For each test case count how many of the seven values are 1 (sunny days). Since there are exactly seven days, the number of rainy days is 7‑count. The weather report is good iff count > 7‑count, i.e. count > 3. So we just compare the count with 3 and output the corresponding answer.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few integer variables are used.

code.C:
#include <stdio.h>
int main(){int T; if(scanf("%d",&T)!=1) return 0; while(T--){int cnt=0,x; for(int i=0;i<7;i++){scanf("%d",&x); cnt+=x;} if(cnt>3) printf("YES\n"); else printf("NO\n");} return 0;}
code.Python3:
import sys

def solve():
    data=list(map(int,sys.stdin.read().split()))
    if not data:
        return
    t=data[0]
    idx=1
    out=[]
    for _ in range(t):
        cnt=sum(data[idx:idx+7])
        idx+=7
        out.append('YES' if cnt>3 else 'NO')
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))

if __name__=='__main__':
    solve()
